Off Calendar Jul-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David R. Dequit, Judgment Debtor appearing in Propria Persona
No other appearances.

THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except for $50 per pay period. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
